For multi-line comments, this is the ending line.","type":["number","string"]},"path":{"description":"File path relative to the repository root (e.g., 'src/auth/login.js'). selector row with `ChoiceChip` buttons whose labels are computed from each config\\u0026#39;s model name (falling back to `Config N`), maintain a stable ID hint, preserve the existing API-key blank-to-keep behavior, and keep state list-based to support future multiple slots.\\n\\n### Testing\\n- Ran `./tools/init_dev_env.sh` successfully to bootstrap the development environment.\\n- Ran `flutter analyze apps/mobile_chat_app/lib/features/settings/model_settings_screen.dart apps/mobile_chat_app/lib/features/settings/llm_config_service.dart` and it completed with no issues.\\n- Installed Node dependencies with `cd apps/node_backend \\u0026amp;\\u0026amp;
